Title: Assessing True Generalisability of Audio-Visual Speech Recognisers
Affiliation: Trinity College Dublin, Imperial College London
Author: Zhaofeng Lin, Stavros Petridis, Maja Pantic, Naomi Harte
Description: Introduces MV2LRS3, a controlled unseen test set subsampled from MultiVSR to strictly match the acoustic, visual, and demographic distribution of LRS3, and shows that five state-of-the-art audio-visual speech recognition models suffer a universal performance collapse under these matched conditions. A fine-grained attribute analysis isolates the drivers of degradation, indicating current systems fail to truly generalise.
